title: [codereview-pass1-correctness] coap_dtn.c missing coap_respond helper and full CBOR parse for recipient IID in deaddrop_post; s_last_confession unused in rate limit
description: Logical chunk 1 edit introduced compile issues and incomplete semantic fix for destination_iid parse per spec 18.9. Uses placeholder. Zephyr build will fail. Also add confessions_post with rate limit using s_last_confession under mutex. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-95a1
